nodes.name: Cron — 06:30 Europe/Paris
nodes.notes: Timezone from n8n instance setting. Confirm GENERIC_TIMEZONE=Europe/Paris on the host.

nodes.name: Fetch RSS + Reddit Sources
nodes.notes: Fetches all RSS/Reddit feeds. Remove a row in RSS_FEEDS to disable a source.

nodes.name: Apify — Twitter (last 24h)
nodes.notes: Apify actor pulls last 24h tweets. Requires APIFY_API_KEY in n8n env. onError=continue so a dead source never blocks the issue.

nodes.name: Ollama — Curate (7 themes)
nodes.notes: Self-hosted Ollama on the VPS (localhost:11434). qwen2.5:7b with format=json forces a JSON reply. CPU inference is slow — timeout 300s. If OOM under n8n load, pull qwen2.5:3b and change the model here.

nodes.name: Held? (< 3 stories)
nodes.notes: TRUE = too few stories passed the theme filter -> hold the issue, don't send. FALSE = send.

parameters.query: insert into brief.issues (issue_date, story_count, sent_count, status, note) values (current_date, {{ $json.story_count }}, 0, 'held-no-stories', 'Held: fewer than 3 stories passed the theme filter.')

nodes.name: Log Held Issue
nodes.notes: Create an n8n Postgres credential pointing at BOOK_DATABASE_URL (the lead-capture Supabase pooler, port 6543).

nodes.name: Notify Manu — Held
nodes.notes: Alerts Manu that the issue was held. Requires RESEND_API_KEY + a verified BRIEF_FROM_EMAIL.

parameters.query: select email, token from brief.subscribers where status = 'active' and lang = 'fr'

nodes.name: Get Active Subscribers
nodes.notes: Reads confirmed FR subscribers from the same BOOK_DATABASE_URL Supabase project.

nodes.name: Build Resend Batch
nodes.notes: One rendered email per active subscriber (their token in the unsubscribe link) + a monitor copy to Manu. Caps at Resend's 100-per-batch — matches the free-tier daily ceiling.

nodes.name: Resend — Batch Send
nodes.notes: Sends the whole issue in one batch call. RESEND_API_KEY + verified BRIEF_FROM_EMAIL domain required (Phase 0).

parameters.query: insert into brief.issues (issue_date, story_count, sent_count, status) values (current_date, {{ $('Build Resend Batch').first().json.story_count }}, {{ $('Build Resend Batch').first().json.sent_count }}, 'sent')
